productDisplayName: Locomotive Men Solid Poplin Lamech Navy Blue Shirts
description: CompositionDark navy blue full sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has gingham tape detailing on the inseam of the collar and cuffs, mock insert pocket on the left chest, full length buttoned placket, sleeves with buttoned cuffs, curved hemline and brand tab near the right hemFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this  dark navy blue shirt from locomotive. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. The sleeves can be rolled up for a different look. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-17.5 "
